pages.text: Long ago, ancient botanists discovered that the natural mana flowing through mystical flowers resonated with the arcane energies wielded by spellcasters.$(br2)By binding runes to living magic, they created a hybrid discipline: $(l)Botanical Spellcasting$().$(br2)These verdant mages could command nature itself, turning gardens into arsenals and forests into sanctuaries.

pages.title: Mana Conversion
pages.text: The key to Botanical Magic lies in converting Botania's natural mana into the arcane mana used for spellcasting.$(br2)The conversion ratio is $(l)1000 Botania mana = 1 ISS mana$().$(br2)This may seem expensive, but Botania's abundant mana generation makes it sustainable for dedicated practitioners.
Your first step is to craft a $(l)Botanical Focus$(). This curio item enables passive mana conversion from your Botania items to your spell mana pool.

pages.title: Using the Focus
pages.text: 1. Equip the Botanical Focus in a Curio slot$(br)2. Right-click to toggle $(l)Siphon Mode$()$(br)3. Ensure you have Botania mana in your inventory$(br)4. Your spell mana will automatically regenerate!$(br2)The Focus drains 1000 Botania mana per second to restore 1 spell mana per second.
